title: Sonay Kartal's Injury Ends Her Tennis Match
summary: Sonay Kartal, a tennis player from Britain, had to stop playing in an important match at Indian Wells because of a back injury. She was playing against Elena Rybakina, who is ranked third in the world. Kartal had been getting medical help during the match because her back hurt a lot. She lost the first set 6-4 and was behind in the second set when she decided she couldn't continue. Kartal said the pain got worse as the match went on, and it was 'one match too many.' She had been dealing with this injury throughout the tournament but tried her best. Even though she was hurt, she made the match competitive. Kartal is the first British woman to reach the fourth round at Indian Wells twice. Rybakina will now play in the next round against another player.

background_read: Indian Wells is a big tennis tournament in California, USA. Players from around the world compete there. Injuries can happen in sports, and sometimes players have to stop playing if they get hurt. Sonay Kartal is a British tennis player who was doing well but had to quit because her back hurt too much.
Article_Structure: WHO: Sonay Kartal, a British tennis player
WHAT: She had to retire from a match due to a back injury
WHERE: At the Indian Wells tournament in California
WHY: Because the pain got too intense to continue playing

perspectives.description: Kartal felt the injury made it impossible to play her best, showing how athletes listen to their bodies.
